title: Implement the GitLab target and merge-request client
summary: Add server-side GitLab access for project and group targets using environment-driven configuration.
deliverables: Error handling for not found and upstream failures
acceptance_criteria: GitLab requests run only on the server
The client supports both project and group targets
The base URL and token are configurable via env vars
verification: Typecheck of the GitLab client layer
notes: Use fixture mode when credentials are unavailable.
